items.title: Switch 2 deals ahead of Prime Day: Console bundle, pre-order discounts, games, more
items.summary:
The early Prime Day deals are landing across loads of product categories and brands at this point, but with the way things are going it seems like discounts on Switch 2 and its games are going to be hard to come by. There is a chance we see some price drops on older Switch 1 titles, much like we are right now, but today’s game deal roundup is going to feature the best deals on Switch 2 consoles and the new Switch 2 games while they are still live just in case:

  • Nintendo Switch 2: Choose Your Game Bundle $499
  • Up to $530 value now, up to $580 value after upcoming price hike
  • Nintendo Switch 2 $434 (Reg. $449)
  • Using code NEW15 at checkout (New customers only)
  • Kirby and the Forgotten Land + Star-Crossed World $65 (Reg. $80)
  • Turok Trilogy Bundle – Nintendo Switch $15 (Reg. $25)
  • Nintendo Switch Sports Resort Nintendo Switch 2 Edition $50 (Reg. $60)
  • Fire Emblem: Fortune’s Weave Nintendo Switch 2 Edition $70 (Reg. $80)
  • Orbitals Nintendo Switch 2 Edition $40 (Reg. $50)
  • Star Fox Nintendo Switch 2 $50 (Reg. $60)
    • Matched at Amazon
  • Splatoon Raiders $50 (Reg. $60)
    • Matched at Amazon

Everything announced at today’s Nintendo Direct: 50-mins. of upcoming Switch 2 games

Nintendo officially reveals Legend of Zelda Ocarina of Time remake for Switch 2

Play the tutorial and first campaign mission in the new Star Fox Switch 2 game for FREE now

items.title: Matter smart plug with automatic night light just $5 each with this 4-pack down at $20 (All-time low)
items.summary:
4-pack of Linkind Matter Smart Plugs with Night Light

Buy for $20 (Reg. $34)

Apply YRTQRCYR during checkout.

What we love

This smart plug supports the Matter standard, meaning it works across a wide range of smart home platforms, including Apple Home, Google Home, Alexa, and Samsung SmartThings. One of the highlights here is the built-in night light, something you don’t typically find on most smart plugs. It can automatically turn on when the surrounding room gets dark and switch itself off once ambient lighting returns.

items.title: Anker SOLIX flash sale offers expanded 7,680Wh F3800 power station + FREE cover at exclusive $3,133, more from $265
items.summary: As part of its ongoing Early Prime Day Sale, Anker SOLIX has launched another flash sale window that benefits from our exclusive bonus savings code – but this one is only lasting for 24 hours. You’ll find a nice array of 508Wh to 7,680Wh power station units here, and if you’re looking for some considerable backup power support I suggest the 7,680Wh F3800 Portable Power Station with an expansion battery and a FREE protective cover ($99 value) at $3,133.10 shipped, after using our code 9TO5DEALS5 at checkout, which beats Amazon’s pricing by $366. It fetches $3,498 at full price these days after the brand permanently cut prices across its lineup last month, with discounts in 2026 being sparse and only lowering costs to $3,298, while March did see a fall to $3,099. You’ll be scoring a $365 markdown off the new going rate ($4,165 off the original MSRP) for the second-best price we have tracked in 2026. If you want just the 3,840Wh station alone, you can find it down at $1,709.05 shipped, after using the above code, or head below to browse the rest of this flash sale lineup.
